print.doc: Prints a message to the console.

params.label: message: Any
params.doc: The object or text to print.

input.doc: Reads a line of input from the console.

params.label: prompt: String
params.doc: The prompt displayed to the user.

sin.doc: Returns the sine of the given angle.

cos.doc: Returns the cosine of the given angle.

random.doc: Returns a random float between 0.0 and 1.0.

length.doc: Returns the number of elements in the array or characters in the string.

push.doc: Adds a new element to the end of the array.

pop.doc: Removes the last element from the array and returns it.

insert.doc: Inserts an element at the specified index.

params.label: index: Int
params.doc: The zero-based index at which to insert.

remove.doc: Removes the element at the specified index.

params.label: index: Int
params.doc: The index of the element to remove.

reverse.doc: Reverses the order of elements in the array in place.

map.doc: Creates a new array populated with the results of calling the provided function on every element.

params.label: callback: Function
params.doc: Function that produces an element of the new Array.

filter.doc: Creates a new array with all elements that pass the test implemented by the provided function.

params.label: callback: Function
params.doc: Predicate function to test each element.

forEach.doc: Executes a provided function once for each array element.

params.label: callback: Function
params.doc: Function to execute on each element.

split.doc: Splits a string into an array of substrings.

params.label: separator: String
params.doc: The pattern describing where each split should occur.

join.doc: Creates and returns a new string by concatenating all of the elements in the array.

params.label: separator: String
params.doc: Specifies a string to separate each pair of adjacent elements.

substring.doc: Returns the part of the string between the start and end indexes.

params.label: start: Int
params.doc: The index of the first character to include.

params.label: end: Int
params.doc: The index of the first character to exclude.

trim.doc: Removes whitespace from both ends of a string.

replace.doc: Returns a new string with some or all matches of a pattern replaced by a replacement.

indexOf.doc: Returns the index of the first occurrence of the specified value.

includes.doc: Determines whether the array/string includes a certain value among its entries.

startsWith.doc: Determines whether a string begins with the characters of a specified string.

params.label: search: String
params.doc: The characters to be searched for at the start of this string.

endsWith.doc: Determines whether a string ends with the characters of a specified string.

params.label: search: String
params.doc: The characters to be searched for at the end of this string.

toNumber.doc: Parses a string and returns a floating point number.

getEnv.doc: Retrieves the value of an environment variable.

params.label: name: String
params.doc: The name of the environment variable.

exit.doc: Terminates the current process with the specified exit code.

args.doc: Returns an array containing the command-line arguments passed when the Node.js process was launched.

connect.doc: Establishes a TCP connection to the specified host and port.

listen.doc: Listens for incoming TCP connections on the specified port.

params.label: port: Int
params.doc: The port number to listen on.

accept.doc: Accepts an incoming connection on a listening socket.

params.label: size: Int
params.doc: The maximum number of bytes to receive.

now.doc: Returns the current time in milliseconds since the Unix Epoch.

sleep.doc: Pauses the execution for the specified number of milliseconds.

params.label: ms: Int
params.doc: The time to sleep in milliseconds.

Map.keys.doc: Returns an array of all keys in the map.

Map.values.doc: Returns an array of all values in the map.

Map.has.doc: Returns true if the map contains the specified key.

Map.remove.doc: Removes the specified key from the map and returns its value.

Map.set.signature: Map.set(map: Map, key: Any, value: Any) -> Any
Map.set.doc: Sets the value for the key in the map object.

params.label: key: Any
params.doc: The key of the element to add or update.

params.label: value: Any
params.doc: The value of the element to add or update.
